titleStmt.title: SII 30.186: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 186. (A.R. No. 262 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Rājādhirāja-Chōḻa I: year 34: 1052 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription commences with the praśasti tiṅgaḷērtaru taṉtoṅgal etc. It records the gift of gold for providing food offering to the deity Pāsupatamūrti when it was taken out in procession for śrībali in the morning service at the temple of Pōndai mahādēva, by a Veḷḷāḷa woman named Mādevaṉ Tiruvaṉtāḷ who was a native of Niyamam in Puḻaṟ-Kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam. The Śivabrahmaṇas of the temple received the amount and agreed to maintain the charity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikīḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkolOcci karuṅkali kaṭintu tantaiyār tamaya
ntampiyar tanṟirumaintar Enṟivarai maṇimuṭicūṭṭi kanniy kāvalaṉ teṉṉavar mūvaruḷ vānakam Iruvarukkaruḷi kānakam Oruvanukkaḷittup po
rucilai ceralan velaikeḻu kāntaḷurcālai kalammaṟuppittilaṅkaiyark karacaiyum Alaṅkal vallavaṉaiyum kaṉṉakkucciyar kāvala(n)ṉaiyum ponṉaṇi
muṭittalai taṭintu tan koṭippaṭai Ēvi kannāṭakar viṭu kaṭakari puraḷa tannāṭaiyiṟ tamiḻpparaṇi koṇṭonnār vacciraneṭuvāḷ viccai
veruneḷittañci Ōṭa tan vañciyampaṭaiyālāṅkavan pitāvaiyum mātāvoṭu catarmali vīṅkunīr pūṇṭūr veñcamattakappaṭuttayaṟ paṭaiyākavamallaṉ payat
toṭu varaviṭum Oṟṟarai veruvarap piṭippittāṅkavar m(ā)ruvilāhava mallaṉ yāṅkaṇumañcinanenna nankeḻutic celuttiya pinṉait tan pulik koṭippaṭaiñarroṭṭa
vāraṇavaraicai kaṭalpuraic ciṟutuṟai peruntuṟai teyva vīmakaci yenṟu Uṟutuṟai mūnṟilum Āṅkavarettak kiriyiṉ
Ōṅki kaluḻuvai yeṟeḻuti Uyar jayastampam Eḻilpeṟa niṟutti tankaḻal paṇintoḻukumaraicarkaḷoṭu ceṉṟāṭi porupuli vīrakkoṭiye tiyākakkoṭi Eṭutte
Onnalar kavarnta tonnitip piṟakkam Iravalarā necarki yīntu viravalil Avanviṭu taṇṭattavan velpuravi nuḷampanuṅ kāḷitāsanum
muṇṭaṉum poṟkommayanum villavarājanum matilnaṉ velcamat teriyal poka Avvavar peruneti kavarntu kuccaranuppaḷaṉ koymalaṟ pacuntalaitārttayilap
paṉait taṭintu muṉkoṇṭu takaivaṉa tappai mun taippavu mappakai cekuttup puḷanvaḻiyil tappil mallaraicarkaḷāṅkatu mīṭka māṭṭātu pūṅkaḻal caraṇeṉappukuta Araṇavarkkaḷit
tu taṭamuṭi mīṭṭukkuṭuttu muṭikkiṭaṅ kuṭuttiṭuttu takaivaṉa tappaiyai paṟittuṭankoṇṭu porttuṟai punal Iraṭṭapāṭi Erimaṭuttav viraṭṭam Ēḻaraiilakkamu Initinitāṇ
ṭu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi niṉṟasvametañ ceytaracu vīṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan Uyarnta perumpukaḻ korājakecari panmarāna muṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu niyamattiṉ kīḻveḷḷāṭṭi mātevan tiruvaṉtāḷen Immaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu piramatecam parākramacoḻac caruppe
timaṅkalattu śrīpontai Uṭaiya mātevar śrīkoyilil śrīpali Eḻuntaruḷum śrīpācuvatamūrttikaḷukku ciṟukālai santi Onṟinukku tiruvamutukku Arici I
ru nāḻikku nellu Aiññāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu Onṟukkum neyamutu Oru ceviṭaraikkum Aṭaikkāy Amutukku veṟuṅkāy Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai nālukkum nellu nāḻi Uḻakkāḻākkum Āka santi Onṟiṉukku
nellu Aṟunāḻi Uḻakku Āḻākkukku vaitta ceḻumai pon pannirukaḻañcu Ippon nicatam kaikkoṇṭu Ipparicu nivantam cantirātittavaṟ celutta kaṭavomāka Ikkoyil tiruvuṇ
ṇāḻikai Uṭaiya civabrāmaṇaṉ kāśyapan kaḻanitiruttu parākkirama coḻa paṭṭanum kāśyapan tikaṭampa paṭṭanāna tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanum kāśyapan vilvapaṭṭanum nārāṇaṉ Arintama pāradvājiyum k kūttaṉum kāśyapan cunda
ratevanāna vānmikayesvara kāśyapan Aṟakāḷi paṭṭaṉum kāśyapantiruppontaippaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ippon panniru kaḻañcum kaḷarikaic cellak koṇṭu Innivantam celuttuvatā
nom Ikkoyil muḷḷārom Ippon panniru kaḻaiñcālum palicaiyāl nicatam nellu Aṟunāḻi Uḻakku Āḻākkāl Innivantam cantirātittavaṟ muṭṭāmec celuttuva
tānom Ikkoyil Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ikkoyil śrīkaraṇattān tivākarannāṉa kamalappiriyanneṉ Ivai yenneḻuttu
Erikkak kaṭavomānom
Digital edition of SII 30.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
